payload.title: First Dedicated Bus Lanes in Soundview to Begin Serving 45,000 Daily Riders

evidence_refs.source_quote: IMMEDIATE RELEASE Friday, December 3, 2021

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation (DOT)

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) announced today
MTA buses serving 45,000 riders
NYPD Chief of Transportation Kim Royster
MTA Bus Company President Acting President and New York City Transit Department of Buses Senior Vice President Frank Annicaro

payload.description: Conversion of major thoroughfares in the Soundview neighborhood of the South Bronx into bus-priority corridors, including new bus lanes, Vision Zero pedestrian safety improvements, and transit-signal priority technology along three miles of Story Avenue, Bronx River Avenue and White Plains Road.

evidence_refs.source_quote: completed the conversion of major thoroughfares in the Soundview neighborhood of the South Bronx into bus-priority corridors

payload.description: Bus priority corridor in Soundview, South Bronx with new curbside bus lane

evidence_refs.source_quote: Story Avenue, Bronx River Avenue and White Plains Road

payload.description: Bus priority corridor in Soundview, South Bronx with new bus lane in the traffic lane in effect at all times

evidence_refs.source_quote: Story Avenue, Bronx River Avenue and White Plains Road

payload.description: Bus priority corridor in Soundview, South Bronx with new curbside bus lane

evidence_refs.source_quote: Story Avenue, Bronx River Avenue and White Plains Road
MTA's Bx5, Bx36 and Bx39 routes
MTA's Bx5, Bx36 and Bx39 routes
MTA's Bx5, Bx36 and Bx39 routes

payload.description: New curbside bus lanes on Story Avenue and White Plains Road
payload.location_text: Story Avenue and White Plains Road

normalized_location.raw_text: Story Avenue and White Plains Road

evidence_refs.source_quote: The new curbside bus lanes on Story Avenue and White Plains Road are now in effect Monday-Friday, 7am and 7pm.

payload.description: New bus lane in the traffic lane along Bronx River Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: The new bus lane in the traffic lane along Bronx River Avenue is in effect at all times.

payload.description: Painted curb extensions to calm traffic and improve safety for pedestrians at five intersections

evidence_refs.source_quote: Painted curb extensions to calm traffic and improve safety for pedestrians at five intersections.

payload.description: Transit Signal Priority, a smart-signal system that speeds up bus service by holding green lights and making red lights shorter when a bus is approaching

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transit Signal Priority, a smart-signal system that speeds up bus service by holding green lights and making red lights shorter when a bus is approaching.

payload.description: Updated daytime parking regulations to accommodate bus lanes, which reduced parking along the bus routes during daytime hours on weekdays

evidence_refs.source_quote: Updated daytime parking regulations to accommodate bus lanes, which reduced parking along the bus routes during daytime hours on weekdays.

payload.description: Angled parking was added on adjacent side streets at community request, including along Boynton, Soundview and Taylor Avenues
payload.location_text: Boynton Avenue, Soundview Avenue, Taylor Avenue

normalized_location.raw_text: Boynton Avenue, Soundview Avenue, Taylor Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Angled parking was added on adjacent side streets at community request, including along Boynton, Soundview and Taylor Avenues.

payload.description: Bus lane cameras will be activated beginning today with warnings being issued for the first 60-days. After the 60-day warning period, bus lane cameras will issue fines starting at $50 and progressively increasing to $250 for subsequent violations within a one-year period.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus lane cameras will be activated beginning today with warnings being issued for the first 60-days. After the 60-day warning period, bus lane cameras will issue fines starting at $50 and progressively increasing to $250 for subsequent violations within a one-year period.

payload.description: NYC DOT announced completion of Soundview bus-priority corridor conversion with new bus lanes, pedestrian safety improvements, and transit-signal priority

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOT announced today that it has completed the conversion

evidence_refs.source_quote: average peak-period speeds at about 5 MPH

payload.raw_value_text: over half a million daily riders

evidence_refs.source_quote: over half a million daily riders

payload.raw_value_text: seven new bus lane miles in the Bronx since 2020
payload.scope: Bronx, including this project along with 149th Street, Edward L Grant Hwy. and University Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOT has added seven new bus lane miles in the Bronx since 2020

payload.claim_text: DOT has worked cooperatively with the MTA for its planned Bronx Bus Network Redesign. The redesign had identified these major Soundview corridors serving the MTA's Bx5, Bx36 and Bx39 routes as especially congested, with slow and unreliable service.

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOT has worked cooperatively with the MTA for its planned Bronx Bus Network Redesign

payload.claim_text: The bus lanes will be enforced by the NYPD, alongside DOT automated enforcement cameras.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The bus lanes will be enforced by the NYPD, alongside DOT automated enforcement cameras.
